name: ESLint
description: Integrates ESLint JavaScript into VS Code.

store_metadata.name: ESLint
store_metadata.short_description: Integrates ESLint JavaScript into VS Code.

findings.detail: Activation event 'onStartupFinished': Runs every launch - immediate execution
Contributes 'taskDefinitions': Can define tasks that run shell commands

findings.name: Publisher-domain mismatch: dbaeumer vs json.schemastore.org
findings.description: Publisher "dbaeumer" does not match operational domain "json.schemastore.org"

findings.name: Publisher-domain mismatch: dbaeumer vs eslint.org
findings.description: Publisher "dbaeumer" does not match operational domain "eslint.org"

findings.detail: webpack@5.99.9 has known vulnerability GHSA-38r7-794h-5758 — webpack buildHttp HttpUriPlugin allowedUris bypass via HTTP redirects → SSRF + cache persistence (fix: >=5.104.0)
webpack@5.99.9 has known vulnerability GHSA-8fgc-7cc6-rx7x — webpack buildHttp: allowedUris allow-list bypass via URL userinfo (@) leading to build-time SSRF behavior (fix: >=5.104.1)

vulns.summary: webpack buildHttp HttpUriPlugin allowedUris bypass via HTTP redirects → SSRF + cache persistence
webpack buildHttp: allowedUris allow-list bypass via URL userinfo (@) leading to build-time SSRF behavior

all_findings.name: Shell execution with user-controlled input (same file)
all_findings.description: User input source (QuickPick/InputBox) and shell command execution exist in the same file - user input may reach shell commands. Review whether input is properly sanitized.
all_findings.evidence: User input + shell execution co-located in: server\out\eslintServer.js, client\out\extension.js

all_findings.name: Local tool integration: workspace monitoring + command execution (no network)
all_findings.description: Extension monitors workspace activity and executes commands but has NO network access. Consistent with local CLI tool integration. High capability but justified pattern.
all_findings.evidence: File open monitoring (onDidOpenTextDocument) + Command execution via ShellExecution/tasks API + no network

medium_risk.description: Monitors text document changes in real time

low_risk.description: Tracks developer activity (file opens, saves, folder changes, paths)

signals.description: No code obfuscation or evasion techniques detected
Extension activates only on specific events, not wildcard

risk_classification.summary: Multiple suspicious patterns detected alongside high-risk capabilities. Obfuscation, data exfiltration, or credential theft patterns suggest potentially malicious intent. Manual review strongly recommended.
